news.summary: Missing out on a rebound can be just as nerve-wracking as being caught in a market selloff. This is highlighted in a 3-minute segment on MLIV that discusses the importance of timing in the market. The segment emphasizes that keeping an eye on market movements is crucial, as even a brief moment can result in significant gains or losses. Investors are advised to stay informed and act promptly to make the most of market opportunities.
news.headline: Missing a rebound can be as worrisome as being caught in a selloff. Stay updated with the 3-minute MLIV. #Finance #Bloomberg
JPMorgan sees an additional hit of 0.5% to Euro Area GDP forecast, taking total GDP hit from trade war to 1.5% by end-2026, which will still allow Euro Area to avoid recession.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Genuine Marketing Group Inc. (OTC: GMGZ) unveiled its ZPTAG® Carbon Intensity Pilot set to begin on April 14th, involving over twelve farms and agribusinesses. This initiative aims to assist farmers while supplementing ZPTAG's FSMA solution.
news.headline: Genuine Marketing Group Inc. (OTC: GMGZ) introduces Carbon Intensity Pilot Program with more than a dozen farms on April 14th.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 8, 2025, Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP), a consulting and technology services company specializing in custom software, data engineering, and modernization solutions, revealed the selection of Michael Labate as the new Chief Revenue & Marketing Officer.
news.headline: Growth Acceleration Partners (GAP) appoints Michael Labate as new Chief Revenue & Marketing to accelerate client impact.

news.summary: In Chicago, six renowned female confectioners have collaborated to launch The Chicago Women-Owned Candycopia Candy Collection. This collection features a curated selection of artisanal sweets, highlighting women entrepreneurship in the industry. The initiative aims to support local mothers and promote their businesses.
news.headline: 6 Chicago women candymakers collaborate on exclusive collection to support "New Moms" organization, celebrating female entrepreneurship.

news.summary: Using advanced machine learning technology, a recent innovation is now available to review past claims data in order to pinpoint inaccuracies, simplify resubmissions, and recoup previously missed revenue. This development comes from Red Sky Health, a company based in New York, with an AI-powered system aimed at enhancing the efficiency of healthcare claims processing. The solution is designed to analyze historical data and facilitate the identification and correction of mistakes, ultimately leading to improved financial outcomes for healthcare providers. This promising tool is set to revolutionize the way claims management is handled in the industry.
news.headline: Red Sky Health introduces AI platform Daniel to help healthcare providers recapture denied claims, leveraging machine learning to analyze data for error detection and income recovery.

news.summary: In North Bethesda, Maryland on April 8, 2025, the Orthobiologics Research Initiative (ORI) was established as a nonprofit organization by a group of physician leaders from Regenerative Orthopedics & Sports Medicine. The primary goal of ORI is to increase access to regenerative therapies. They are actively fundraising to support this mission.
news.headline: Nonprofit ORI aims to advance equity in regenerative medicine with fundraising drive - launched by physician leaders.

news.summary: In Torrance, California on April 8, 2025, GITAI USA Inc. revealed the formation of its new branch, GITAI Defense & Space LLC, based in Delaware and functioning from its headquarters in Torrance.
news.headline: GITAI USA Inc. forms GITAI Defense & Space LLC for U.S. government contracts, based in Torrance, California.

news.summary: Levi Strauss & Co. released its first-quarter results, excluding its Dockers business, which is now classified as a discontinued operation. The company exceeded revenue expectations on a comparable basis. They reported quarterly adjusted earnings of 38 cents per share, surpassing the 28 cent analyst consensus. Despite quarterly revenue of $1.5 billion missing the $1.54 billion consensus estimate, it's important to note that approximately $67 million in sales from the Dockers business were excluded from Levi's reported revenue due to reclassification. This information was provided after Monday's closing bell by Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI).
news.headline: Levi Strauss (LEVI) surpasses Q1 earnings estimate with 38 cents per share, revenue of $1.5B (excluding $67M from Dockers).

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Los Angeles, Framerate Technologies introduced the View+Finders Podcast via PRNewswire. This podcast offers busy professionals brief, informative conversations with influential industry leaders who are revolutionizing the entertainment sector.
news.headline: Framerate Technologies launches View+Finders Podcast featuring concise discussions with industry leaders.

news.summary: Strider Bikes will be organizing an exciting race for young children who ride bikes in Downtown Rapid City, SD. The event, known as the Rapid City Strider Cup, is scheduled for June 28, 2025, in the scenic setting of the Black Hills. It is specifically designed for Strider riders between the ages of 2 to 4 years old who are prepared to showcase their cycling skills.
news.headline: Strider Bikes to host epic race for tots in Rapid City, SD on June 28, 2025, open to ages 2 to 4. #StriderCup

news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 8, 2025, a global wellness platform called Wellness Coach revealed that it has passed its SOC 2® Type II audit. This audit was done by Accorian Assurance and confirms that Wellness Coach complies with the necessary security and confidentiality requirements. This achievement underlines the platform's commitment to ensuring the well-being of the workforce.
news.headline: Wellness Coach achieves SOC 2® Type II Compliance after successful audit by Accorian Assurance.

news.summary: PHINIA Inc., a renowned company in premium fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket solutions, will be participating in Bank of America’s Securities 2025 Automotive Summit in New York City on April 15, 2025, at 3:00pm ET. The event will feature a fireside chat hosted by PHINIA. Those interested can access a webcast of the presentation and related materials on PHINIA’s Investor Relations webpage. The discussion will be led by PHINIA’s President and CEO, Brady Ericson, along with CFO C.
news.headline: PHINIA to be at Bank of America’s 2025 Automotive Summit in NY on April 15, 2025, at 3:00pm ET. President and CEO to host a fireside chat. Webcast available on PHINIA’s website.

news.summary: In Charlottesville, Virginia, Apex Clean Energy has revealed a new deal with EGCO Group involving the partial sale of a portfolio of energy assets totaling 251 megawatts.
news.headline: Apex Clean Energy sells 251 MW portfolio to EGCO Group in strategic selldown agreement.
Saudi Foreign Minister will visit the United States on Tuesday - Official Source.

news.summary: The Student Assistant program from Cengage has expanded to include new GenAI capabilities, benefitting over one million students. The initiative, based in Boston, aims to enhance educational experiences for a large number of students through the incorporation of artificial intelligence technology.
news.headline: Cengage's Student Assistant Expansion with AI reaches over 1M students to enhance personalized learning.

news.summary: In St. Louis, Cass Information Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASS) has announced the sale of its Telecom Expense Management & Managed Mobility Services (TEM) business to Asignet USA Inc. The agreement involves transfer of assets to Asignet, a prominent IT expense management provider known for hyper-automation. Martin Resch, President and CEO of Cass, stated that the sale aligns with the company's strategy to concentrate capital investments. This move signifies a strategic shift in Cass's business focus.
news.headline: Cass Information Systems sells TEM business to Asignet, a hyper-automation IT expense provider. Important numbers: Nasdaq: CASS.

news.summary: A global leader in AI-driven clean energy solutions, Stem, Inc. (NYSE: STEM), will discuss its first-quarter results ending on March 31, 2025, through a conference call on Tuesday, April 29. The call is set for 5:00 p.m. ET, following a press release at approximately 4:05 p.m. ET. Interested parties can access the conference call through a live webcast on a listen-only basis at a designated link.
news.headline: Stem, Inc. to hold conference call on April 29, 2025, discussing first quarter results; call starts at 5 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In Taipei, Taiwan, market research firm TrendForce has adjusted its projections for the global end-device market in 2025 due to the potential impact of US tariffs. The firm has warned that production costs could rise and consumer demand may slow down as a result. This development underscores the challenges facing the industry, with significant implications for key players in the market. The specifics of the adjustment in the market outlook, including any revised figures or forecasts, were not detailed in the provided information.
news.headline: US tariffs impact 2025 global end-market outlook, causing reduced investments and consumption momentum, as reported by TrendForce.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Fastly recently announced a new feature aimed at enhancing protection and security transparency against DDoS attacks. The feature, called DDoS Attack Insights, provides detailed information to help users better defend against such attacks. This offering is a part of Fastly's content delivery network (CDN) services. The new feature is expected to provide crucial data and insights to clients when facing DDoS attacks, thereby strengthening their security measures.
news.headline: Fastly announces new DDoS attack insights for enhanced protection and security transparency. #FSLY #CDN

news.summary: Asahi Kasei has recently announced the formation of Asahi Kasei Life Science to manage its bioprocess operations as part of a new organizational setup. This move signifies a strategic shift within the company towards focusing on its life science segment. The establishment of Asahi Kasei Life Science reflects the company's commitment to strengthening its presence in the bioprocess market. This restructuring initiative aims to enhance efficiency and drive growth in the life science sector. With this development, Asahi Kasei is poised to further establish itself as a key player in the bioprocess industry, leveraging its expertise and resources to capitalize on market opportunities.
news.headline: Asahi Kasei creates Asahi Kasei Life Science for bioprocess business growth in Tokyo, Novi, & Düsseldorf.

news.summary: Knostic, based in Herndon, Va., has been selected as one of the Top 10 Finalists for the RSAC™ 2025 Conference Innovation Sandbox contest. The company specializes in providing need-to-know access controls for Generative AI and is recognized for its efforts in securing enterprise large language models (LLMs) on a large scale. Knostic will showcase its technology at the RSAC™ 2025 Conference at the Moscone Center in San Francisco on Monday, April 28 before a panel of respected industry judges and a live audience. It marks a significant milestone for the company in the field of AI security.
news.headline: Knostic is a finalist for RSAC 2025 Innovation Sandbox contest for securing LLMs, presenting on April 28 in San Francisco.

news.summary: Mountain View-based Confluent, Inc. (NASDAQ: CFLT), a leading data streaming company, revealed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2025, concluding on March 31, 2025. This announcement is set to occur post-U.S. market closure on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. The company will conduct a live video webcast to delve into these results. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, April 30, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. PT / 4:30 p.m. ET. For details on the webcast, visit https://investors.confluent.io.
news.headline: Confluent to reveal Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025 after U.S. market close. Live webcast at 1:30 p.m. PT.

news.summary: Brenmiller Energy Ltd., a top provider of thermal energy storage solutions to industrial and utility markets, announced that its bGen™ ZERO TES system was honored with a gold Edison Award in the Energy Storage and Management category at the 2025 Edison Awards Gala in Fort Meyers, Florida, United States. Avi Brenmiller, the Chairman and CEO, was present at the event. The company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol BNRG.
news.headline: Brenmiller Energy's bGen™ ZERO TES system wins Gold at 2025 Edison Awards in Energy Storage category. CEO Avi Brenmiller attends.

news.summary: VISTA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Flux Power has recently shared an update regarding significant orders received from top airlines, marking a notable shift towards sustainable Ground Support Equipment (GSE) solutions within the industry. This move highlights a growing trend towards environmentally friendly practices, with the company experiencing a surge in demand. The exact number of orders and airlines involved were not disclosed, but the shift underscores a larger transition happening within the aviation sector towards more sustainable operations.
news.headline: Flux Power receives significant orders from top airlines, reflecting industry's move towards sustainable GSE solutions.

news.summary: A recent study conducted by Mirvie in South San Francisco has revealed groundbreaking insights into the biology of preeclampsia. The research offers unparalleled clarity on pregnancies, particularly identifying those at the highest risk of developing the condition. This discovery has the potential to significantly impact prenatal care and improve outcomes for expecting mothers and their babies.
news.headline: Mirvie's study reveals breakthrough findings on preeclampsia, predicting risk early on with a simple blood test.
Japan secures prime position in US tariff talks.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has reached 4.2%, with a total of 6.5 million individuals currently out of work. This marks a slight decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.4%. Additionally, the economy added 431,000 jobs in various sectors such as manufacturing, healthcare, and technology. Despite these positive developments, experts are cautious about the ongoing labor market challenges and the potential impact of rising inflation rates. With the holiday season approaching, many are hopeful that the job market will continue to improve, providing opportunities for those seeking employment.
news.headline: China pledges to combat tariffs and support markets amid economic challenges. #TradeWar #China #Tariffs

news.summary: The 3D bioprinting market, valued at US$1.2 billion in 2023, is expected to grow at a CAGR of 12.7%, reaching US$1.3 billion in 2024 and US$2.4 billion by 2029. This growth is driven by increased adoption of 3D bioprinting technology in pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries, technological advancements, partnerships, and investments in R&D. The market is segmented into 3D bioprinters, bioinks, software, and consumables, with 3D bioprinters holding the largest share in 2023. Research applications dominate the market, with drug research being the leading segment. The Asia Pacific region is projected to have significant growth due to its large population, manufacturing capabilities, healthcare partnerships, rising government funding, and stem cell research activities. Key drivers include industry adoption, while high costs and expenses constrain growth, with opportunities arising from increased demand for organ transplants.
news.headline: 3D Bioprinting Market valued at $1.2B in 2023, to hit $2.4B by 2029 - fueled by technological advancements and rising demand for organ transplantation services in pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries. APAC region anticipated to witness significant growth.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the total number of COVID-19 cases in the country has surpassed 100,000, with 5,000 new cases confirmed in the last 24 hours. The death toll has reached 2,000, with 100 new fatalities recorded yesterday. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to prevent further spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter lockdown measures in highly affected areas to curb the rising numbers. The situation is being closely monitored, and updates will be provided as new information becomes available.
news.headline: Market rebound with Japan leading the way in trade talks; stocks recover after significant losses.

news.summary: In a press release dated April 8, 2025, Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP disclosed an ongoing inquiry into Old Second Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSBC) on behalf of shareholders. The investigation is aimed at evaluating potential breaches of fiduciary responsibilities by Old Second Bancorp's directors. The outcome of this examination could have significant implications for the company's stakeholders.
news.headline: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP investigates Old Second Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSBC) for breach of fiduciary duties.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Vibrant Emotional Health (Vibrant), a prominent mental health organization in the United States, praised Representatives Jay Obernolte (R-CA) and Debbie Dingell (D-MI) along with Senators for their support. Vibrant serves as the lead organization for the 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, a crucial mental health resource. The 988 Lifeline offers support and assistance to individuals in crisis.
news.headline: Vibrant Emotional Health supports the 9-8-8 Lifeline Cybersecurity Responsibility Act reintroduction in Congress. #mentalhealth #988Lifeline

news.summary: In a recent announcement, LexisNexis® Risk Solutions revealed the appointment of Valentina Isakina as the new Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer. Isakina will report directly to Mark Kelsey, the Chief Executive Officer of the company. In her new position, she will be responsible for strategic decision-making and overseeing key operations within the organization. This appointment signifies a significant move within LexisNexis® Risk Solutions management team, with Isakina taking on a pivotal role in guiding the company's direction.
news.headline: Valentina Isakina named Chief Strategy Officer at LexisNexis Risk Solutions, reporting to CEO Mark Kelsey.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Cincinnati Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: CINF) announced its intention to unveil the first-quarter 2025 financial results on April 28, 2025, following the Nasdaq Stock Market's regular trading hours. A conference call will then be conducted by the company to delve deeper into the results.
news.headline: Cincinnati Financial to report Q1 2025 results on April 28, 2025. Conference call to follow. (Word count: 20)

news.summary: In preparation for anticipated growth in the United States, the experiential agency Jack Morton is making significant investments in talent on a national scale. The company has recently promoted John Howard to the role of President, US, and Ashley Brantman to a...
news.headline: Jack Morton promotes John Howard to US President along with other leadership promotions to invest in talent at national level.

news.summary: Today, First Book and Ashoka, prominent organizations in the education and social entrepreneurship sectors, revealed the winners of a $5,000 grand prize and $1,000 grants. The recipients were recognized for their efforts in implementing community-based solutions and promoting changemaking. This announcement was made in Washington on April 8, 2025.
news.headline: 17 winners of the Youth Challenge initiative with $5,000 grand prizes and $1,000 grants to promote community-based solutions for change.

news.summary: Collins Aerospace, a segment of RTX (NYSE: RTX), is leveraging their extensive data analytics capabilities to offer vital insights into aircraft systems. With their expertise in predictive health monitoring solutions, they are set to enhance airline operations. This development was announced on April 8, 2025, in Atlanta.
news.headline: Collins Aerospace (RTX) partners with Digital Alliance for Aviation to enhance predictive maintenance solutions for airlines.

news.summary: A recent study conducted by Retirement Income Institute fellows David Blanchett and Michael Finke reveals that retirees tend to spend more when they have a source of lifetime income. The research, released on April 8, 2025, in Washington, sheds light on the spending habits of retirees. Despite having the financial means to afford a better quality of life, retirees appear hesitant to dip into their savings for increased enjoyment. This reluctance indicates a trend where retirees prioritize preserving their wealth over indulging in leisure activities, even when they have adequate resources. This behavior underscores the importance of securing a stable income stream in retirement. The findings suggest that retirees with guaranteed lifetime income are more likely to allocate funds towards enhancing their lifestyle, thus emphasizing the significance of having a dependable income source during the post-retirement years.
news.headline: Retirees opt to spend lifetime income rather than savings, as per study by David Blanchett and Michael Finke.

news.summary: A recent report by ABI Research revealed that the count of functional LEO (including VLEO) satellites will surge from 7,473 in 2023 to roughly 42,600 by 2032. This substantial growth indicates a significant increase in satellite deployment. Additionally, the report hints at China and Europe playing pivotal roles in this expansion.
news.headline: LEO satellites in orbit to rise from 7,473 in 2023 to 42,600 by 2032 per ABI Research report. Partnerships and competition growing.

news.summary: Ricoh USA, Inc. has unveiled a new range of advanced color A3 multifunction printers (MFPs) integrated with PFU production-class scanner technology. With this enhancement, users can now digitally capture hardcopy media in different materials and formats. The announcement was made in Exton, Pennsylvania on April 8, 2025. This development marks a significant step in digital scanning technology, allowing for seamless conversion of physical documents into digital formats.
news.headline: Ricoh unveils A3 MFPs with straight path scanner for digital capture, featuring PFU production-class scanner.

news.summary: A recent survey revealed that 60% of adults expressed interest in receiving their own Easter basket. The quality of chocolate emerged as the top priority for individuals when buying seasonal treats. This information was shared by Ferrero North America on April 8, 2025. The company is known for producing popular brands such as Ferrero Rocher, Nutella, Kinder, Tic Tac, and Butterfinger.
news.headline: Survey finds 3 in 5 adults want Easter baskets; top quality chocolate key in buying treats.

news.summary: A recently launched index called the Bloomberg Versa 10 Index (BVERSA10) by Bloomberg Indices is designed to provide dynamic exposure to a diverse range of assets including U.S. Equities, Treasuries, Gold, and the U.S. Dollar. The index aims to target volatility strategically. This news was announced on April 8, 2025, in New York. The Bloomberg Versa 10 Index is expected to offer investors a unique opportunity to access a mix of these assets for diversified investment options.
news.headline: Bloomberg introduces new multi-asset index, Versa 10, targeting diversified exposure across U.S. Equities, Treasuries, Gold, and the U.S. Dollar.

news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on April 8, 2025, Silver Point Capital, a prominent player in credit investing worldwide, revealed its Direct Lending arm has spearheaded financing for the acquisition of noosa Holdings, Inc. This company is a major producer and promoter of premium whole-milk products.
news.headline: Silver Point Capital provides financing for acquisition of noosa Holdings by Lakeview Farms. No specific numbers provided.

news.summary: 360 Pet Nutrition, a leading pet food brand, has launched its premium freeze-dried raw pet foods at various Walmart stores across the country. This Los Angeles-based company made the exciting announcement on April 8, 2025. The high-quality pet foods are now accessible to customers looking for nutritious options for their furry friends.
news.headline: 360 Pet Nutrition® launch at select Walmart stores nationwide with premium freeze-dried raw pet foods.

news.summary: Yonah Group, a company led by Army veterans Michael Maniaci and Miles Kirwin, recently revealed their acquisition of Pella CT-NY, the distributorship for Pella Windows & Doors covering Connecticut and portions of New York. This move signifies a key investment for the company in the region. The announcement was made on April 8, 2025, in Monroe, Connecticut.
news.headline: Army veterans Michael Maniaci and Miles Kirwin buy Pella CT-NY distributorship in a strategic move. #businessgrowth

news.summary: A company specializing in AI/ML-driven clinical development, PhaseV, is set to showcase the impact of advanced machine learning in improving trial design, execution, and analysis. The presentations will take place in various biotech and data science events, emphasizing the significant role of AI/ML in revolutionizing the field. The company's involvement signifies a growing trend towards leveraging technology for enhancing clinical trials. The presentations are expected to draw attention to the benefits of incorporating advanced machine learning techniques, reflecting the increasing adoption of innovative approaches in the industry. This move underscores the importance of staying abreast with technological advancements to optimize trial processes and outcomes.
news.headline: PhaseV will showcase the impact of AI in clinical development, focusing on ML for enhancing trial design.Scheduled to present in various events.

news.summary: In the wake of ongoing labor shortages and increasing consumer demands, service robots equipped with artificial intelligence (AI) are revolutionizing the hospitality and food service sectors. These advancements are now being witnessed in various establishments such as hotels, restaurants, and cafes.
news.headline: AI-powered service robots are revolutionizing hospitality amid labor shortages. Hotels and restaurants are adopting them to meet rising consumer expectations.

news.summary: Santa Paula, California - Limoneira Company (Nasdaq: LMNR), a citrus company involved in growing, packing, selling, and marketing, along with agribusiness and real estate development operations, has revealed plans to enter a 50%/50% joint venture with Agromin Corporation. Agromin Corporation, the leading organics waste recycler in California, will collaborate with Limoneira to expand their organic waste recycling program. This partnership aims to enhance the current recycling initiatives and maximize the benefits derived from organic waste recycling.
news.headline: Limoneira partners with Agromin for major expansion of organic recycling program in a 50/50 joint venture.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, IperionX has announced the initiation of the Titan Critical Minerals Project's definitive feasibility study with the support of the U.S. government. The project, known as IPX, is estimated to bring significant economic benefits to Virginia.
news.headline: IperionX starts Titan project feasibility study with U.S. backing in Virginia. #IPX.

news.summary: Standard Chartered predicts that XRP's market capitalization will surpass Ethereum's by the end of 2028, making it the second-largest non-stablecoin digital asset. Geoffrey Kendrick from Standard Chartered made this bold forecast, citing XRP's growth in cross-border payment role and market dynamics. The New York Stock Exchange approved a leveraged XRP ETF, signaling rising mainstream interest in the cryptocurrency. Kendrick noted XRP's potential to outperform Ethereum, attributing this shift to XRP's utility in cross-border and cross-currency payments. The digital assets market segment is predicted to continue growing, supporting this trend.
news.headline: Standard Chartered predicts XRP will surpass Ethereum by 2028, becoming the second-largest crypto; XRP's utility in cross-border payments a key factor.
